text:
Hotels  |  Wellness
Spa  |  Real Estate
Integrated into One Strategic System.
ECHELON
INTERNATIONAL

Echelon International is an integrated advisory company 
specializing in hotels, wellness & spa destinations, and real estate 
development.
We work with developers, investors, and operators at the stage 
where strategic decisions dene long-term value, supporting 
projects where clarity, positioning, and structure are critical to long-
term success.
ECHELON
INTERNATIONAL
WHO WE ARE

Elena Ristavaara
Founder | Investment & Governance, Strategy
Elena Ristavaara brings extensive international experience in real estate 
investment, hospitality, wellness, and mixed-use development. Her 
professional background spans strategic development, investment structuring, 
operator alignment, and long-term asset positioning across multiple 
international markets.
   She has led and advised large-scale projects ranging from the early 
conceptualization of hotels, wellness and medical spa destinations, and 
recreational facilities, to the structuring of complex mixed-use and 
infrastructure assets. Her work is characterized by a governance-driven 
approach, ensuring that strategic vision, capital structure, and operational 
models are aligned from the earliest stages of development.
   Importantly, Elena serves as a Board Member of ESPA – the European 
Spas Association, one of the world's leading spa and wellness associations. In 
this role, she contributes to strategic governance, brand development, and 
international expansion initiatives within the global hospitality and wellness 
industry. In addition, she has held board-level and senior advisory roles for 
development companies and investment platforms, supporting institutional-
level decision-making and long-term value creation.
FOUNDERS
ECHELON
INTERNATIONAL

Sophio Meshvildishvili
Founder | Real Estate Marketing, Commercial & Sales Strategy
Sophio Meshvildishvili has over a decade of hands-on experience working with 
major development companies, in close collaboration with both local and 
international investors. Her professional background is rooted in the 
commercialization of real estate projects and the translation of development 
strategy into market performance.
She has also gained professional marketing and branding practice in Italy, 
which has shaped her strategic approach to brand positioning, communication, 
and market perception within international real estate and hospitality contexts.
Sophio has worked across a wide range of asset types, including large-scale 
residential complexes in Tbilisi, low-density suburban developments, and 
commercial real estate projects across urban, suburban, and coastal markets. 
She has led projects through the full commercial cycle — from early positioning 
and product deﬁnition to pricing strategy, market launch, and sales execution.
Within Echelon International, Sophio is responsible for go-to-market strategy, 
commercial structuring, and sales management. Her core expertise lies in 
aligning branding, communication, pricing frameworks, and sales systems with 
real buyer behavior, regional demand dynamics, and long-term asset value, 
ensuring that projects function as integrated commercial systems rather than 
isolated marketing initiatives.
FOUNDERS

We engage with projects at the stage where strategic clarity 
determines future value.
Our approach is built on decades of combined international 
experience across real estate, hospitality, wellness, marketing, 
and investment advisory, allowing us to operate at the intersection 
of strategy, capital, and execution.
PHILOSOPHY
ECHELON
INTERNATIONAL

We approach projects as integrated systems rather than isolated components.
Strategy, market logic, branding, sales management, and capital structuring are developed in parallel to ensure 
alignment between vision, execution, and long-term asset performance.
HOW WE THINK
ECHELON
INTERNATIONAL

SERVICES
Echelon International provides integrated advisory services across
 hospitality, wellness, spa, and real estate development.

Development strategy and feasibility
 Highest & Best Use (HBU) analysis

Echelon International acts as a strategic partner at the stage where decisions deﬁne long-term asset value.
Hospitality, Wellness
 & Medical Spa Development
(Concept & Operator Alignment)

Hospitality, wellness, and medical spa concept 
development

Branding, Marketing

& Capital Advisory

Market analysis, feasibility studies, highest & best use (HBU), 
development phasing, and nancial structuring form the foundation 
of every project we support.
Our focus is on aligning market realities, investment logic, and 
development ambition into a coherent, bankable strategy.
STRATEGIC DEVELOPMENT
& FEASIBILITY
ECHELON
INTERNATIONAL

Strategic concept development for hotel, resort, and wellness / 
medical spa destinations, based on extensive international 
experience across diverse hospitality and wellness markets.
Our work spans urban hotels, resort destinations, and wellness-
focused developments, covering the full project lifecycle — from 
early vision and concept formation to positioning, operator 
alignment, and long-term value strategy.
HOSPITALITY & WELLNESS
STRATEGY
ECHELON
INTERNATIONAL

Branding and positioning are treated as strategic commercial 
instruments, not visual decoration.
We develop brand concepts, naming, brand books, and project 
narratives that support pricing, demand creation, market 
differentiation, and long-term perception.
BRANDING & POSITIONING
ECHELON
INTERNATIONAL

Pricing strategy, sales systems, CRM, lead generation funnels, and 
performance reporting are developed as integrated commercial 
frameworks.
Our focus is on building scalable, transparent sales systems aligned 
with product positioning and real buyer behavior.
GO-TO-MARKET & SALES 
MANAGEMENT
ECHELON
INTERNATIONAL

Investor positioning, strategic partner search, deal structuring, and 
preparation of projects for investment and operator engagement
We support projects in aligning development vision with capital 
expectations, institutional requirements, and long-term asset 
strategies.
INVESTMENT & CAPITAL ADVISORY

     partners (project-based)
PARTNER BRANDS & OPERATORS

Selected hospitality, wellness, residential, commercial, and mixed-use projects across urban, suburban, and coastal 
regions.
Case Study 
Ensana Hotels & Sairme 
Strategic advisory and market-entry support for 
Europe’s leading medical spa hotel operator, for its 
Ensana Hotels, 
expansion into the Georgian market through the 
destination.
Sairme Resort 
Echelon International supported the project at the strategic level, including market positioning, communication strategy, 
and alignment between the international operator and the local asset structure. The engagement focused on positioning 
Sairme as a multi-layered wellness destination combining medical spa heritage, hospitality standards, and long-term 
resort value.
This project represents Ensana Hotels’ ﬁrst entry into Georgia and includes three assets: 
New Sairme, Sairme Resort,
Sairme Public Spa
 and 
, with reopening scheduled for 2026.
Year: 2025
Sector: Hospitality & Medical Wellness
Role: Strategic Advisory, Positioning & Market Entry Support
